displayTitle: Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead #2
synopsis: Boba Fett is dead, and whoever hired the hit squad had better run—as fast and as far as possible! A mysterious avenger is on the trail of Boba Fett’s killers. Connor Freeman—a clone relation to Fett—has been drawn into the whodunit. Freeman, who feels like he could use some protection himself, has been recruited against his will to find and protect a particular bounty hunter on a distant world—in Mandalorian space! * Writer Tom Taylor brings Blood Ties back with Boba Fett! * Painted interiors and covers by Chris Scalf!
title: Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead #2
